creator: kseniia.journey-london-rexby
caption:
🎀 Pinkmas at Peggy Porschen Belgravia 🎀

It’s the most magical, fairytale season of the year — and there’s no sweeter place to celebrate than @peggyporschenofficial I stopped by for a festive brunch, seasonal cupcakes, and the cutest Pinkmas cookies from their new Pinkmas Collection.

💗 Imagine: pink envelopes, Santa cookies tied with tiny bows, and iced gingerbread men ready for holiday mischief… A cookie lover’s dream wrapped in sugary, pastel wonder!

🍰 Pinkmas Brunch Highlights include 
✨ Gingerbread Pancakes
✨ Festive French Toast
Beautiful, picture-perfect, and totally delicious — the ultimate Instagrammable Christmas brunch in London.

Don’t miss the gorgeous Peggy Porschen Advent Calendar, perfect for gifting or treating yourself. More details soon!
